result:
Phase 4 shipped. Here's what changed:

| Area | What was built |
|---|---|
| `GET /api/dictionary` | New route — returns user's dictionary entries with heap names |
| `DictionaryClient.tsx` | Client component with live search, TTS buttons (🔊 for both EN and BG), unlock date per heap section |
| `dictionary/page.tsx` | Now a thin server wrapper that passes DB data to `DictionaryClient` |
| `profile/page.tsx` | Queries actual word count via `jsonb_array_length(words)` from dictionary table; stats cards use distinct colors; added first-time CTA |
| `HeapGame.tsx` | `heap-complete` phase gets trophy animation, sparkle row, TTS replay per word, and a "View Dictionary" shortcut button |

The progress route was already writing to the dictionary table on loop 2 completion — so the reward unlock was already wired. Phase 4 just adds the UI to surface and celebrate it.
